name: kimi-workflows
description: Run Claude Code dynamic-workflow scripts on Kimi CLI -- fan out Kimi agents with the agent/parallel/pipeline DSL, supervised fleets, live viewers, and run analytics.

interface.shortDescription: Run Claude Code dynamic workflows on Kimi CLI agents.
interface.longDescription: Run Claude Code dynamic-workflow scripts on Kimi CLI. Orchestrate many Kimi agents with the agent/parallel/pipeline DSL, sessionful steerable workers, supervised fleets (--multi), live viewers, and run analytics.
